Notice And Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted; Request For Attorney Fees Of $125.00 Plus Filing Fees Of $40.00
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Asset Acceptance LLC's Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. The matters in Plaintiff Requests For Admission are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $165, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
